title: Acadia Pharma Q3 Profit Soars to $32.8M as Revenue Jumps 18%; Raises 2024 Outlook
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals Q3 2024 Financial Results. Revenue Performance: Total Q3 2024 revenues: $250.4 million, representing 18% year-over-year growth. NUPLAZID net product sales: $159.2 million (up 10% YoY). DAYBUE net product sales: $91.2 million (up 36% YoY). Nine-Month Results (Jan-Sept 2024): Total revenues: $698.2 million. NUPLAZID YTD sales: $446.5 million. DAYBUE YTD sales: $251.7 million. Profitability: Q3 2024 net income: $32.8 million ($0.20 per share). Q3 2023 net loss: $65.2 million ($0.40 per share). Nine-month 2024 net income: $82.7 million ($0.50 per share). Operating Expenses: R&D expenses: $66.6 million. SG&A expenses: $133.3 million. Cost of product sales: $18.9 million. Balance Sheet: Cash and investments (Sept 30, 2024): $565.3 million. Total assets: $976.9 million. Stockholders' equity: $577.2 million. 2024 Guidance (Updated): NUPLAZID: $600–$610 million. DAYBUE: $340–$350 million. Total revenue: $940–$960 million.
